grant_title: Funding Opportunities and Programmatic Insights for Advancing Shared Use Paths, Trails, and Greenways in New Jersey
project_area: Shared use paths, trails, and greenways development and funding
demographic_requirements: None specified; focus on community well-being and accessibility for all users
eligibility_summary: Open to government agencies, non-profits, local municipalities, and regional planning commissions in New Jersey seeking to advance shared use paths, trails, and greenways. Focus on funding opportunities, planning, and implementation.
